---
title: "`r paste('Chikv | CellChat hierarchy plots', switch(params$pair, A_C_vs_NC='Acute - Chronic vs Non-Chronic', '6m_C_vs_NC'='6 months - Chronic vs Non-Chronic', NC_A_vs_6m='Non-Chronic - Acute vs 6 months', C_A_vs_6m='Chronic - Acute vs 6 months'), c(all='unfiltered', pfilt='p-value filtered')[params$sfx], sep=' | ')`"
author: "Giorgio Gonnella"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: sandstone
params:
  analysis: "1"
  input_step: "07.P.compute_cellchat"
  input_rds: "so_w_cellchat.rds"
  this_step: "07.V.cellchat_results"
  pair: "A_C_vs_NC"
  sfx:  "pfilt"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, echo = FALSE)
withr::with_dir(here::here(), { source("renv/activate.R") })

library(Seurat)
library(CellChat)
library(rmdreportdeck)
reportdeck_setup()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache=F)

analysis_root <- here::here(paste0("analysis-", params$analysis,"/"))
input_var_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$input_step, "/results/vars/")
if (!dir.exists(input_var_dir))
  stop("Input variable directory does not exist: ", input_var_dir)
this_step_dir <- paste0(analysis_root, "steps/", params$this_step, "/")
if (!dir.exists(this_step_dir))
  stop("Current step directory does not exist: ", this_step_dir)

pair_map <- list(
  A_C_vs_NC    = c("A_NC",  "A_C"),
  `6m_C_vs_NC` = c("6m_NC", "6m_C"),
  NC_A_vs_6m   = c("A_NC",  "6m_NC"),
  C_A_vs_6m    = c("A_C",   "6m_C")
)
if (!params$pair %in% names(pair_map)) stop("Unknown pair: ", params$pair)
if (!params$sfx  %in% c("all", "pfilt")) stop("Unknown sfx: ", params$sfx)

conds  <- pair_map[[params$pair]]
nm1    <- conds[1]; nm2 <- conds[2]
sfx    <- params$sfx
thresh <- if (sfx == "pfilt") 0.05 else 1
pfx    <- paste0(params$pair, ".", sfx)

plots_outdir <- paste0(this_step_dir, "results/", params$pair, "/", sfx, "/plots/")
dir.create(plots_outdir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

idx <- list(
  B_cells         = c(1,2,3,4,5),
  CD4_T_cells     = c(6,7,8,9,10,11,12,13),
  CD8_T_cells     = c(14,15,16,17),
  GD_T_cells      = c(18,19),
  Dendritic_cells = c(22,23),
  Monocytes       = c(24,25,26),
  Other_cells     = c(20,21,27)
)

.fig_counter <- 0L

pretty_cell_group <- function(x) {
  gsub("_", " ", x, fixed = TRUE)
}

safe_asset_suffix <- function(x) {
  gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]+", "_", x)
}

write_tsv <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  write.table(x, file = path, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE, na = "")
  invisible(path)
}

matrix_to_long <- function(m, value_name = "value") {
  out <- expand.grid(source = rownames(m), target = colnames(m), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  out[[value_name]] <- as.vector(m)
  out
}

pathway_matrix_df <- function(cc_obj, condition, pathway, receiver_group, receiver_idx) {
  lr_names <- dimnames(cc_obj@net$prob)[[3]]
  pw_map <- cc_obj@LR$LRsig[lr_names, "pathway_name"]
  lr_idx <- which(pw_map == pathway)
  prob <- cc_obj@netP$prob[, , pathway, drop = TRUE]
  count <- if (length(lr_idx) == 0) prob * 0 else
    apply(cc_obj@net$prob[, , lr_idx, drop = FALSE] > 0, c(1, 2), sum)
  receiver_cells <- levels(cc_obj@idents)[receiver_idx]
  df <- matrix_to_long(prob, value_name = "communication_probability")
  df$lr_interaction_count <- as.vector(count)
  df$condition <- condition
  df$pathway <- pathway
  df$receiver_group <- receiver_group
  df$receiver_in_group <- df$target %in% receiver_cells
  df[, c("condition", "pathway", "receiver_group", "receiver_in_group",
         "source", "target", "lr_interaction_count", "communication_probability")]
}

report_href <- function(path) {
  file.path("..", "results", params$pair, sfx, "plots", path)
}

h <- function(level, text) {
  writeLines(c("", paste0(strrep("#", level), " ", text), ""))
}
```

# Goal

Visualize CellChat ligand–receptor signaling as hierarchy plots for a given condition pair and
filter setting. Each panel shows the communication network for one pathway and one receiver
cell group, with sender and receiver cells arranged hierarchically.

```{r load_so}
so <- readRDS(file = paste0(input_var_dir, params$input_rds))
cc <- so@misc$cc[[sfx]]
```

```{r hierarchy_render, include=FALSE}
hierarchy_items <- list()
for (nm in c(nm1, nm2)) {
  all_pathways <- cc[[nm]]@netP$pathways
  outdir       <- file.path(plots_outdir, "hierarchy", nm)
  dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  for (pathway in all_pathways) {
    for (cg in names(idx)) {
      fstem    <- paste0(nm, ".", sfx, ".", gsub(" ", "_", pathway), "_receiver_", cg)
      png_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, "_hierarchy.png"))
      pdf_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, "_hierarchy.pdf"))
      tsv_path <- file.path(outdir, paste0(fstem, "_hierarchy.tsv"))

      for (dev_fn in list(
        list(fn = function(p) png(p, width = 900, height = 1200), path = png_path),
        list(fn = function(p) pdf(p, width = 9, height = 12),     path = pdf_path)
      )) {
        dev_fn$fn(dev_fn$path)
        netVisual_aggregate(cc[[nm]], signaling = pathway,
          layout = "hierarchy", vertex.receiver = idx[[cg]], thresh = thresh,
          vertex.weight = 5, show.legend = TRUE,
          vertex.label.cex = 0.6, point.size = 0.3,
          scale = TRUE, big.gap = 15, small.gap = 2)
        title(paste0(nm, " (", sfx, "): ", pathway, " - ", cg))
        invisible(dev.off())
      }

      write_tsv(pathway_matrix_df(cc[[nm]], nm, pathway, pretty_cell_group(cg), idx[[cg]]),
                tsv_path)

      hierarchy_items[[length(hierarchy_items) + 1]] <- list(
        condition = nm,
        pathway = pathway,
        cell_group = cg,
        cell_group_label = pretty_cell_group(cg),
        suffix = safe_asset_suffix(paste(nm, pathway, cg, sep = ".")),
        png = report_href(file.path("hierarchy", nm, basename(png_path))),
        pdf = report_href(file.path("hierarchy", nm, basename(pdf_path))),
        tsv = report_href(file.path("hierarchy", nm, basename(tsv_path))),
        png_filename = basename(png_path),
        pdf_filename = basename(pdf_path),
        tsv_filename = basename(tsv_path)
      )
    }
  }
}
```

```{r hierarchy_display, results='asis'}
current_condition <- NULL
current_pathway <- NULL
for (item in hierarchy_items) {
  if (!identical(current_condition, item$condition)) {
    current_condition <- item$condition
    current_pathway <- NULL
    h(1, item$condition)
  }
  if (!identical(current_pathway, item$pathway)) {
    current_pathway <- item$pathway
    h(2, item$pathway)
  }
  h(3, item$cell_group_label)
  .fig_counter <- .fig_counter + 1L
  fig_id <- paste0(.fig_counter, ".", pfx)

  cat(as.character(report_asset_bar(
    report_figure_name(fig_id, suffix = item$suffix),
    report_download_link("Download PNG", item$png_filename, item$png),
    report_download_link("Download PDF", item$pdf_filename, item$pdf),
    report_download_link("Download TSV", item$tsv_filename, item$tsv)
  )), "\n")
  cat(paste0("**Fig ", .fig_counter, ". ", item$condition, " - ",
             item$pathway, " - ", item$cell_group_label, "**\n\n"))
  cat(paste0('<img src="', item$png, '" width="672" />', "\n\n"))
}
```

# Session info

```{r session_info, echo=FALSE}
sessionInfo()
```
